column2: Prompt
column3: Response

column2:
User Story 1: Submitting Extracurricular Activities
• User Story: As a student,
I want to submit extracurricular activities,
so that I can prove that I have completed extracurricular activities.
column3:
Scenario: Submitting extracurricular activities
  Given a student is logged into the school portal
  And the student has completed extracurricular activities
  When the student submits the extracurricular activities
  Then the activities should be recorded in the student's profile
  And the student should receive a confirmation message

column2:
User Story 2: Checking Accumulated Hours
• User Story: As a student,
I want to check my accumulated hours,
So that I can track the progress of my complementary
activities.
column3:
Scenario: Student checks accumulated hours
  Given a student is logged into the complementary activities tracking system
  And the student has completed some activities
  When the student navigates to the accumulated hours section
  Then the system should display the total accumulated hours
  And the student should see a breakdown of hours by activity type

column2:
User Story 3: Track Submission Status
• User Story: As a student,
I want to track the status of my submissions,
so I know if my assignments are approved, pending, or
rejected.
column3:
Scenario: Track the status of assignment submissions
  Given a student has submitted an assignment
  When the student checks the submission status
  Then the student should see the status as approved, pending, or rejected

column2:
User Story 4: Edit Submissions
• User Story: As a student,
I want to edit submitted submissions,
so that I can correct incorrect information or documents before
grading.
column3:
Scenario: Student edits a submitted submission
  Given a student has submitted a submission
  And the submission is pending grading
  When the student edits the submission
  Then the submission should be updated with the new information
  And the updated submission should be available for grading

column2:
User Story 5: Cancel Submissions
• User Story: As a student,
I want to cancel submitted submissions,
so that I can remove incorrect or duplicate assignments.
column3:
Scenario: Cancel a submitted assignment
  Given a student has submitted an assignment
  And the student is on the submissions page
  When the student cancels the submitted assignment
  Then the assignment should be removed from the submissions list
  And the student should see a confirmation message

column2:
User Story 6: View Submission Rules
• User Story: As a student,
I want to view the submission rules,
so that I can understand what is allowed and the time limits for each activity.
column3:
Scenario: Student views submission rules
  Given a student is on the course page
  When the student navigates to the submission rules section
  Then the student should see the allowed activities
  And the student should see the time limits for each activity

column2:
User Story 7: Evaluating Student Submissions
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to evaluate assignment submissions,
so that I can validate or reject assignments submitted by students.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher evaluates a student's assignment submission
  Given a student has submitted an assignment
  And the teacher is logged into the evaluation system
  When the teacher reviews the assignment
  Then the teacher should be able to validate the assignment
  And the teacher should be able to reject the assignment

column2:
User Story 8: Check Activity Documentation
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to check the documentation attached by students,
so that I can verify that the documents prove completion
of the activities.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher checks documentation attached by students
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And students have submitted their activity documentation
  When the teacher views the submitted documentation
  Then the teacher should see the documents attached by students
  And the teacher should be able to verify the completion of the activities

column1: User Story 9: Sending Feedback to Students
column2:
User Story 9: Sending Feedback to Students
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to send feedback on submitted assignments,
so that I can justify approvals or rejections.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher sends feedback on a submitted assignment
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And a student has submitted an assignment
  When the teacher sends feedback on the assignment
  Then the student should receive the feedback
  And the feedback should justify the approval or rejection of the assignment

column2:
User Story 10: View Grading History
• User Story: As a teacher,
I want to see the grading history of my students,
so I can see all previously approved and rejected assignments.
column3:
Scenario: View grading history of students
  Given a teacher is logged into the grading system
  And the teacher has students with previously graded assignments
  When the teacher navigates to the grading history page
  Then the teacher should see a list of all previously approved assignments
  And the teacher should see a list of all previously rejected assignments

column2:
User Story 11: Manage User Profiles
• User Story: As an administrator,
I want to manage student and teacher profiles,
so that I can create, edit, or remove users as needed
column3:
Scenario: Administrator manages user profiles
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And there are existing student and teacher profiles
  When the administrator creates a new user profile
  Then the new user profile should be added to the system
  And the administrator should see a confirmation message

column2:
User Story 12: Configure Submission Rules
• User Story: As an administrator,
I want to configure submission rules for activities,
so that I can set limits and restrictions for each activity type.
column3:
Scenario: Configure submission rules for activities
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And the administrator navigates to the submission rules configuration page
  When the administrator sets limits and restrictions for an activity type
  Then the submission rules for that activity type should be updated successfully
  And the new rules should be visible in the activity settings

column2:
User Story 13: View General Reports
• User Story: As an administrator,
I want to view general reports of supplemental activities,
so that I can have a consolidated view of all submissions and
approvals.
column3:
Scenario: Administrator views general reports of supplemental activities
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  When the administrator navigates to the general reports section
  Then the administrator should see a consolidated view of all submissions and approvals

column2:
User Story 14: Manage User Permissions
• User Story: As an administrator,
I want to manage permissions for students and teachers,
so that I can control what each type of user can access and do in the system.
column3:
Scenario: Administrator manages permissions for students and teachers
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And there are existing users classified as students and teachers
  When the administrator updates the permissions for a student
  Then the student's access rights should reflect the new permissions
  And the changes should be saved in the system

column2:
User Story 1: Submitting Assignments
User Story: As a student,
I want to submit assignments,
so that I can earn extra hours.
column3:
Scenario: Submitting an assignment to earn extra hours
  Given a student is logged into the assignment portal
  And the student has an assignment ready for submission
  When the student submits the assignment
  Then the assignment should be marked as submitted
  And the student should earn extra hours

column2:
User Story 2: Checking Available Hours
User Story: As a student,
I want to check my available additional hours,
so that I know how many hours I have already accumulated.
column3:
Scenario: Checking available additional hours
  Given a student is logged into the system
  And the student has accumulated additional hours
  When the student checks their available additional hours
  Then the system displays the total number of additional hours accumulated

column1: User Story 3: Checking missing hours and types
column2:
User Story 3: Checking missing hours and types
User Story: As a student,
I want to check the complementary hours that are still missing and their types, so that I can plan the activities that I need to carry out.
column3:
Scenario: Student checks missing complementary hours and their types
  Given a student is logged into the academic portal
  And the student has a record of completed and pending complementary hours
  When the student navigates to the complementary hours section
  Then the system displays the total missing complementary hours
  And the system displays the types of activities required to complete the missing hours

column2:
User Story 4: Approving Assignments
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to approve or disapprove submitted assignments,
so that I can ensure that students complete their hours with valid assignments.
column3:
Scenario: Approving a submitted assignment
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And a student has submitted an assignment
  When the teacher approves the assignment
  Then the assignment status should be marked as approved
  And the student should be notified of the approval

column2:
User Story 5: Pass/Fail Notification
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to notify students about the passing or failing of their assignments,
so that they know whether their submitted assignments were accepted.
column3:
Scenario: Notify students about assignment pass/fail status
  Given a student has submitted an assignment
  And the assignment has been graded
  When the teacher notifies the student about the result
  Then the student should receive a notification
  And the notification should indicate whether the assignment is passed or failed

column2:
User Story 6: View Submitted Activities
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to view the activities submitted by students,
So that I can review and assess the pending activities.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher views submitted activities
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And there are activities submitted by students
  When the teacher navigates to the submitted activities page
  Then the teacher should see a list of submitted activities
  And the teacher should be able to review and assess each activity

column2:
User Story 7: Pending Submission Notifications
User Story: As a student,
I want to be notified when an assignment I submitted is still pending grading,
so that I know my request is being processed.
column3:
Scenario: Notify student of pending assignment grading
  Given a student has submitted an assignment
  And the assignment is pending grading
  When the student checks their notifications
  Then the student should see a notification about the pending grading

column2:
User Story 8: Graded Assignment History
User Story: As a student,
I want to access the history of assignments that have already been graded,
so that I can track the status of my previous submissions.
column3:
Scenario: Access graded assignment history
  Given a student is logged into the student portal
  And the student has previously submitted assignments
  When the student navigates to the graded assignments section
  Then the student should see a list of previously graded assignments
  And each assignment should display its grade and feedback

column1: User Story 9: Filter Assignments by Status
column2:
User Story 9: Filter Assignments by Status
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to filter submitted assignments by status (passed, failed, pending),
so that I can prioritize assessments that have not yet been completed.
column3:
Scenario: Filter assignments by status
  Given a teacher is on the assignments page
  And there are assignments with statuses passed, failed, and pending
  When the teacher filters assignments by status "pending"
  Then only assignments with status "pending" should be displayed

column2:
User Story 1: Student Registration
User Story: As a student,
I want to register in the system,
So that I can access and record my extra hours activities.
column3:
Scenario: Student registers in the system
  Given a student is on the registration page
  When the student submits the registration form
  Then the student should be registered in the system
  And the student should be able to access the extra hours activities section

column2:
User Story 2: Teacher Registration
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to register in the system,
So that I can review and approve student activities.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher registers in the system
  Given a teacher is on the registration page
  When the teacher submits valid registration details
  Then the teacher should be registered in the system
  And the teacher should be able to review and approve student activities

column2:
User Story 3: Student Activity Registration
User Story: As a student,
I want to register my activities with certificates and complementary hours,
So that I can account for my hours in the system.
column3:
Scenario: Student registers an activity with certificates and complementary hours
  Given a student is logged into the system
  And the student has an activity with certificates and complementary hours to register
  When the student submits the activity registration
  Then the activity should be recorded in the system
  And the complementary hours should be accounted for in the student's total hours

column2:
User Story 4: Checking Completed Activities
User Story: As a student,
I want to check which activities have been completed,
so that I can track the progress of my approved extra hours.
column3:
Scenario: Student checks completed activities to track progress
  Given a student has logged into the system
  And the student has completed some activities
  When the student views the list of activities
  Then the system should display the completed activities
  And the student should see the progress of their approved extra hours

column2:
User Story 5: Checking Declined Assignments
User Story: As a student,
I want to check the assignments that have been declined,
So that I can understand and correct the reasons for the decline.
column3:
Scenario: Student checks declined assignments
  Given a student has assignments that have been declined
  When the student views the declined assignments
  Then the student should see the reasons for the decline
  And the student should understand how to correct the issues

column1: User Story 6: Total Complementary Hours Completed
column2:
User Story 6: Total Complementary Hours Completed
User Story: As a student,
I want to view the total number of complementary hours approved,
so that I can monitor my progress and meet the hour requirements.
column3:
Scenario: View total number of complementary hours approved
  Given a student is logged into the student portal
  And the student has completed some complementary hours
  When the student navigates to the progress tracking page
  Then the total number of approved complementary hours should be displayed
  And the student should be able to see if they meet the hour requirements

column1: User Story 7: Review of Pending Activities
column2:
User Story 7: Review of Pending Activities
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to view the activities pending review,
So that I can organize and prioritize the students' assessments.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher views pending activities for review
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And there are activities pending review
  When the teacher navigates to the pending activities section
  Then the teacher should see a list of activities pending review
  And the teacher can organize and prioritize the students' assessments

column1: User Story 8: Approve or Reject Assignments
column2:
User Story 8: Approve or Reject Assignments
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to approve or reject assignments submitted by students,
So that I can ensure the validity of the additional hours submitted.
column3:
Scenario: Approve a student's assignment
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And a student has submitted an assignment
  When the teacher approves the assignment
  Then the assignment status should be marked as approved

column1: User Story 9: Feedback on Assignment Rejection
column2:
User Story 9: Feedback on Assignment Rejection
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to add feedback when rejecting an assignment,
so that the student can understand the reasons and adjust the submission.
column3:
Scenario: Teacher adds feedback when rejecting an assignment
  Given a teacher is logged into the system
  And the teacher has an assignment to review
  When the teacher rejects the assignment
  Then the teacher should be prompted to add feedback
  And the feedback should be saved with the rejection

column2:
User Story 10: Teacher Registration Request
User Story: As an administrator,
I want to check teacher registration requests,
So that I can validate permissions and register new reviewers in the system.
column3:
Scenario: Validate teacher registration request
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And there are pending teacher registration requests
  When the administrator reviews a teacher registration request
  Then the system should display the teacher's details
  And the administrator should be able to approve or reject the request

column2:
User Story 11: Teacher Registration Approval
User Story: As an administrator,
I want to approve registration requests,
so that teachers can start reviewing student activity.
column3:
Scenario: Approve teacher registration request
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And there is a pending teacher registration request
  When the administrator approves the registration request
  Then the teacher should be notified of the approval
  And the teacher should be able to access the system to review student activity

column2:
User Story 12: Editing a User
User Story: As an administrator,
I want to edit a user's details,
so that I can correct or update registration information.
column3:
Scenario: Administrator edits a user's details
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And a user exists with incorrect registration information
  When the administrator updates the user's details
  Then the user's information should be updated in the system
  And the updated information should be displayed correctly

column2:
User Story 13: User Deletion
User Story: As an administrator,
I want to delete users from the system,
so that I can remove records of users who are no longer part of the staff or student body.
column3:
Scenario: Administrator deletes a user from the system
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  And a user exists in the system
  When the administrator deletes the user
  Then the user should be removed from the system
  And the user should no longer have access to the system

column2:
User Story 14: Create User
User Story: As an administrator,
I want to create new users,
so that I can manually add teachers or students to the system as needed.
column3:
Scenario: Administrator creates a new user
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  When the administrator creates a new user
  Then the new user should be added to the system
  And the new user should be able to log in

column2:
User Story 15: Activity Approval Notification
User Story: As a student,
I want to receive activity approval notifications,
So that I know when an activity has been successfully approved.
column3:
Scenario: Receive activity approval notification
  Given a student has submitted an activity for approval
  When the activity is approved by the administrator
  Then the student should receive a notification of the approval

column2:
User Story 16: Assignment Rejection Notification
User Story: As a student,
I want to be notified when an assignment is rejected,
so that I can quickly review and correct my submission.
column3:
Scenario: Notify student when assignment is rejected
  Given a student has submitted an assignment
  And the assignment is reviewed by the instructor
  When the instructor rejects the assignment
  Then the student should receive a notification about the rejection
  And the notification should include the reason for rejection

column2:
User Story 17: Filtering Pending Assignments
User Story: As a teacher,
I want to filter assignments by submission date,
so that I can prioritize the oldest or most urgent assignments.
column3:
Scenario: Filter assignments by submission date
  Given a teacher is logged into the assignment dashboard
  And there are multiple assignments with different submission dates
  When the teacher filters assignments by submission date
  Then the assignments should be sorted by the selected submission date
  And the oldest or most urgent assignments should be prioritized

column2:
User Story 18: Complementary Hours Report
User Story: As a student,
I want to generate a report of my complementary hours,
So that I can track my progress and present it when necessary.
column3:
Scenario: Generate complementary hours report
  Given a student is logged into the system
  And the student has completed some complementary hours
  When the student requests to generate a complementary hours report
  Then the system should generate a report of the student's complementary hours
  And the report should display the total hours completed

column2:
User Story 19: Admin Dashboard
User Story: As an administrator,
I want to access a dashboard,
so that I can quickly view registration requests and the number of active users in the system.
column3:
Scenario: Admin views dashboard for registration requests and active users
  Given an administrator is logged into the system
  When the administrator navigates to the dashboard
  Then the administrator should see the registration requests
  And the administrator should see the number of active users in the system
